title: chrysanthemum anserinifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum anserinifolium, also known as the Anserinum flower, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum anserinifolium are said to include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. Chrysanthemum anserinifolium is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and capsules.
